demos.title: Anonymous session
demos.description: Headless guest session: create(deviceId) mints an anonymous user you can later upgrade to a full account.

demos.title: Authenticator change (instant)
demos.description: Headless instant email/phone change: verify the old channel, then confirm the new one — a four-step OTP ladder.

demos.title: Magic link
demos.description: Headless magic-link request: request(email, redirectUrl) sends a one-tap sign-in link; the redirect is open-redirect-guarded.

demos.title: Passkey login (WebAuthn)
demos.description: Headless passkey sign-in: begin() fetches assertion options; the host performs the credential ceremony and calls submitAssertion().

demos.title: Passkey registration
demos.description: Headless passkey enrolment for a signed-in user: begin() fetches creation options; submitCredential() finishes the ceremony result.

demos.title: Password change
demos.description: Headless change-password for a signed-in user: directly with the old password, or OTP-verified when no password is set.

demos.title: Password login
demos.description: Headless login/password sign-in; on a TOTP challenge the bag surfaces submitTotp() for the second factor.

demos.title: Password reset
demos.description: Headless forgot-password: request an OTP to a channel, then submit the code with the new password.

demos.title: Passwordless login (OTP)
demos.description: Headless email → code → session. The render-prop bag exposes state.step plus requestCode/submitCode/reset; wire your own markup.

demos.title: QR login (cross-device)
demos.description: Headless QR authentication with background polling: start() yields a scanUrl to render as a QR image; delivered tokens adopt into the session.

demos.title: SSO discovery
demos.description: Headless enterprise SSO: lookup(domain) resolves whether a work email must use SSO; beginLogin(orgSlug) redirects to the IdP.

demos.title: TOTP setup
demos.description: Headless authenticator enrolment: start() returns the secret/otpauth URL to render as a QR; confirm() verifies the first code.

demos.title: Verification challenge (step-up)
demos.description: Headless step-up factor prompt raised by a 403 verification interception: chooseFactor(), then submitCode()/submitPasskey().
